title: Secret CE Doors
description: Addon for Celestial Exploration and Secret Doors for CE-specific secret doors (and trapdoors)
body:
Addon for [Celestial Exploration](https://modrinth.com/mod/celestial-exploration) and [Super Secret Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-secret-doors) that adds in CE-specific secret doors!  Includes doors and trapdoors for

- stone and deepslate and variations, for each planet and moon
- ceramic (all 17 colors)
- steel panel
